title: Dynamic Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering and Sorting

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Dynamic Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering and Sorting

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='50' y='50' width='300' height='200' rx='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='100' y='100' width='200' height='100' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='150' y='150' width='150' height='50' rx='5' fill='#411C56'/><g fill='#090a0f'><text x='180' y='220' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Media Library</text></g><g fill='#F7F7F7'><path d='M 120 120 L 140 140 L 160 120' stroke='white' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M 140 140 L 160 160 L 180 140' stroke='white' stroke-width='2'/></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Explicit constraint: Must use only specified colors
Explicit constraint: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Explicit constraint: Must support advanced filtering (category, author, date), sorting (title, date, views), and search functionality

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Dynamic Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering and Sorting

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
